summary: Iteration 6 - Verified trimmed requirements.txt (emergentintegrations removed) did not break any APIs. All 5 backend tests pass. Frontend loads, login works, dashboard renders correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: requirements.txt trimmed to 12 production packages only. All APIs working: health, login (token key), vehicles, dashboard, finance/summary. Token field in login response is 'token' not 'access_token'.
